body_transformation: The rounded head retains its shape but now features a smooth, elongated cranium with subtle cranial ridges, its surface shimmering with a pale lavender mist. The pointed ears remain but are now adorned with delicate, translucent eyelids that glow softly with lilac shimmer. The flower-like structure on top transforms into a crystalline, translucent bud emitting faint glowing neural pathways beneath its surface. The teal body gains a soft white sheen with silver glow accents along the leaf patterns, while the curled spiral tail tip now has a smooth, ethereal texture with pale lavender luminescence.
signature_feature: Flower-like structure on top: crystalline bud with faint glowing neural pathways beneath its translucent surface.
